The game has reached a position where Black is threatening perpetual check or a draw by repetition, and White needs to avoid it. The last few moves show a repeating pattern with White’s knight moving between f8, g6, and e6 while Black’s king shuffles between h7 and h8. To break the repetition and win, White should play **e6g7**, delivering check and forcing the king to h7, after which White can capture the queen on a1 with the rook.  

\boxed{e6g7}
